intended_use: EndoNaut is an image fusion software solution and computerized navigational system intended to assist X-ray fluoroscopy-guided procedures in the positioning of surgical instruments and endovascular de
intended_use_full: EndoNaut is an image fusion software solution and computerized navigational system intended to assist X-ray fluoroscopy-guided procedures in the positioning of surgical instruments and endovascular devices.
target_condition: Endovascular diseases including aneurysm repair, artery/vein embolization, and peripheral artery disease treatment
